title: rubus × hebetidens
intro: Rubus × hebetidens, also known as Himalayan raspberry or Himalayan bramble, is a hybrid species of raspberry that is native to the Himalayan region. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Rubus × hebetidens include its potential to lower cholesterol levels, improve cardiovascular health, and aid in the management of diabetes. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, as well as being used in jams and preserves, although its use as a medicinal agent requires further research and clinical trials.
